# Version & Auto-Update

<!-- Generated by proofd. Rule ID: version-updater. Do not edit manually. -->
<!-- Default Prefix: VA | Prefixes: VA -->

- [VA-01] Tauri updater plugin checks GitHub releases for app updates. version.ts Zustand store manages lifecycle: loadBuildInfo (Rust get_build_info → CARGO_PKG_VERSION + CLAUDE_CODE_BUILD_VERSION), checkForAppUpdate (tauri-plugin-updater check()), downloadAndInstallAppUpdate (download + relaunch()), checkLatestCliVersion (npm dist-tags endpoint), updateCli (detects install method from CLI path, runs appropriate update command). All called from App.tsx startup.
- [VA-02] AppHeader: compact bar above tab bar showing app version, Claude Code build version, and running CLI version. App update button triggers downloadAndInstallAppUpdate with progress display. CLI update button runs background update then re-checks version. newerThan() semver comparison gates update button visibility.
- [VA-03] Rust version commands: get_build_info returns CARGO_PKG_VERSION + CLAUDE_CODE_BUILD_VERSION (embedded at compile time via build.rs cargo:rustc-env). check_latest_cli_version queries npm dist-tags endpoint (10s timeout). update_cli detects install method from CLI path (brew/npm/volta/binary) via detect_install_method with Windows backslash normalization, runs the appropriate update command with CREATE_NO_WINDOW on Windows.
